sous_titres.text: Sorry, I only speak a little Finnish.
Do you still have that feeling you had when I was in Berlin?
The fear that we only exist in your imagination.

But it'll get boring at some point.
Cuddling is the meaning of life.

POLITICALLY, THE ORGANLESS BODY IS A CALL TO SUBVERSION...

it would help to be credited as a co-author.
I did a lot of the supervision.

No, these are supplies for four weeks in the Finnish wilderness.

always wanted me to have a real man.

Living off your husband's money has always been a pattern for you.

who you can push around so you feel secure.

who makes "art" that nobody buys, just to fucking cope.

of Finnish forests so clients feel like they're breathing in nature.

Levonorgestrel is the active ingredient in this medication.
You can take it up to 72 hours after sexual intercourse.
If you throw up three hours after taking the pill,
The sooner you take it, the more likely you'll postpone ovulation and avoid pregnancy.
Do a pregnancy test if your next period is late. Just in case.
